summary: To add a new GET endpoint, you should implement the new method in the AppService and then expose it via a new @Get decorator route in the AppController. Ensure that you update the unit tests in the controller spec and the end-to-end tests to reflect the new functionality.

files.reason: This file contains the route definitions and controller logic where the new endpoint will be registered.
The service layer likely needs a new method implementation to handle the logic requested by the new endpoint.
The unit tests for the controller must be updated to include the new endpoint.
The end-to-end tests should be updated to verify the new endpoint is correctly exposed and reachable.
